toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.command:
# Try fetching debug symbols from Microsoft symbol server for libmonosgen-2.0.so
# Build ID: 1eb39fc72918c7c6c0c610b79eb3d3d47b2f81be
BUILDID="1eb39fc72918c7c6c0c610b79eb3d3d47b2f81be"

# Try the ELF debug info symbol server URL patterns
echo "=== Trying symbol server URLs ==="
# Pattern 1: debug file
curl -sSL -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols/_.debug/elf-buildid-sym-${BUILDID}/_.debug"
echo " - _.debug (sym)"

# Pattern 2: the .so itself with symbols
curl -sSL -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols/libmonosgen-2.0.so/elf-buildid-${BUILDID}/libmonosgen-2.0.so"
echo " - libmonosgen-2.0.so"

# Pattern 3: .so.dbg 
curl -sSL -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols/libmonosgen-2.0.so.dbg/elf-buildid-sym-${BUILDID}/libmonosgen-2.0.so.dbg"
echo " - libmonosgen-2.0.so.dbg"
arguments.description: Try fetching symbols from MS symbol server

data.reasoningText:
I need to symbolicate the .NET runtime frames from `libmonosgen-2.0.so` across all threads. The Build ID is `1eb39fc72918c7c6c0c610b79eb3d3d47b2f81be`.

The frames I need to symbolicate are:

**Thread 7020 (main/crash thread):**
- #01 pc 0000000000222098 libmonosgen-2.0.so
- #02 pc 00000000002241ac libmonosgen-2.0.so
- #03 pc 00000000001abc80 libmonosgen-2.0.so


- #04 pc 000000000016de04 libmonosgen-2.0.so

**Thread 7046 (SGen worker):**
- #02 pc 00000000002f4b20 libmonosgen-2.0.so

# Try fetching debug symbols from Microsoft symbol server for libmonosgen-2.0.so
# Build ID: 1eb39fc72918c7c6c0c610b79eb3d3d47b2f81be
BUILDID="1eb39fc72918c7c6c0c610b79eb3d3d47b2f81be"

# Try the ELF debug info symbol server URL patterns
echo "=== Trying symbol server URLs ==="
# Pattern 1: debug file
curl -sSL -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols/_.debug/elf-buildid-sym-${BUILDID}/_.debug"
echo " - _.debug (sym)"

# Pattern 2: the .so itself with symbols
curl -sSL -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols/libmonosgen-2.0.so/elf-buildid-${BUILDID}/libmonosgen-2.0.so"
